Container.Overview: Automatically creates, updates and deletes UniFi local DNS records when Docker containers start or stop on unRAID. Opt-in per container via Docker labels. Supports CNAME and A records.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for listening to container events. Must be read-only.

Config.Name: UniFi API Key
Config.Description: UniFi API Key. Create one in UniFi → Settings → Control Plane → Integrations.

Config.Name: UniFi Site
Config.Description: UniFi site name. Usually 'default' for single-site setups.

Config.Name: Domain
Config.Description: Your internal domain. Container names become subdomains (e.g. plex.home.example.com).

Config.Name: Default Record Type
Config.Description: Default DNS record type when dns.unifi.type label is not set. CNAME or A.

Config.Name: Default Target
Config.Description: Default CNAME target when dns.unifi.target label is not set (e.g. npm.home.example.com). Required when using CNAME records.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR
